title: Sibba Makeup Pouch Pencil Bag 1PC Small Cosmetic Toiletry Case with Zipper Make Up Purse Inside Organizer Backpack Essentials Aesthetic Make-Up Portable Daily Storage Travel Set(Blue)
features: Travel Makeup Pouch Design: Rectangular pencil pouch with a flat bottom stands up, making it easier to access your cosmetics collection during any routine. Whether you're at home or trip,portable toiletry bag ensures your beauty essentials are always complete set and easy to summarize

Makeup Bag Organizer Zipper Closure:Smooth zipper pull adds a stylish finish to cute pencil bag, keeping your belongings are securely organised and tidy. Large capacity pouches for both functionality and aesthetics in their bath cosmetic storage traveling accessories

Simple Skin Care Bag:Cosmetic bag is spacious enough to accommodate all your beauty essentials like hairbrushes, lipstick, eye shadow, skincare products, shampoo, creams, nail art products, jewelry, toiletries, and travel accessories for organizing your daily make up necessities

Multi-Purpose Beauty Organization:Puffy padded cosmetic bag fits neatly into your purse, backpack, suitcase, gym bag for on-the-go convenience. With dimensions of 6.29 × 3.93 × 3.54 inches / 16 × 10 × 9 cm, meet your requirement for various purpose during travel or everyday makeup storage

Collection Bags :Lightweight toiletry bag for women makes a thoughtful gift for friends, coworkers, or family members at birthdays, holidays, or family gatherings.Fluffy makeup storage bag organiser design make it a versatile and stylish choice for women and girls
description: Category: Makeup Bag Material: Polyester Function: Small travel small makeup bag is made of plush and fluffy polyester material, which is soft and easy to clean. The small plaid bag can be as a women's makeup bag, bathroom storage bag, makeup bag and toiletry bag, and can also store small items such as makeup brushes, perfume, essential oils, shaving supplies, etc. y2k style Product size: 6.29 × 3.93 × 3.54 inches / 16 × 10 × 9 cm Packing list: 1pcs × Cosmetic bag
